MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anthony Grumbach of the Office of the City Attorney, 554-3947, appearing for defendant and moving party
Aaron S. Gorfein of the Law Offices of Daniel Ray Bacon, 864-0907, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

The Court reminded the parties of their disclosures, and there being no objections, the matter was argued. The Court took DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, or in the alternative, Summary Adjudication under submission. Each side to prepare a form of order for the Court's consideration. Per Diem fees were assessed by the Court. (301/PJB/DS) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR 6213
